name: ai.quickdeploy/apollo-graphql
description: QuickDeploy-operated Apollo MCP Server exposing curated read-only GraphQL operations for the QuickDeployAI platform.

ai.quickdeploy.registry/auth.notes: Clients discover the QuickDeploy Supabase OAuth issuer at connect time; access remains subject to the authenticated user's platform policies.

ai.quickdeploy.registry/review.notes: QuickDeploy operates the endpoint using Apollo's pinned v1.16.0 container and a curated read-only operation set. Keep verifiedStatus at review until production stability evidence is complete.
